speaker: charlie
text: Well there you have it - another cracking edition of ParkSyde Bright Side. From dirt batteries to superhero graphene, it's been a ripper of a day for good news.

speaker: alice
text: Don't forget about our little Kungaka skink hiding away in the rocks - sometimes the best discoveries are right under our noses, just waiting to be found. It gives me hope, you know?

speaker: charlie
text: Too right. And who knows, maybe we'll all be watching cricket through AI-powered apps while sitting next to our soil-powered sensors in the backyard. The future's looking pretty bright from where I sit.

speaker: alice
text: That's a wrap for today's ParkSyde Bright Side. We'll be back tomorrow with more good news because let's face it, the world needs more of it. Until then, get outside and enjoy this beautiful Queensland weather.

speaker: charlie
text: Cheers everyone, stay curious and keep looking for the good stuff. It's everywhere when you know where to look. See ya tomorrow!
